svg.title: Escrow lifecycle flow diagram
svg.desc: Shows the DRAFT to FUNDED to ACTIVE to SETTLED escrow lifecycle with tri-party roles: Buyer, Seller, Issuer, and Mediator
svg.text: Daml contract enforces every state transition

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Buyer role in the escrow')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Seller role in the escrow')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Issuer role in the escrow')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Mediator role in the escrow')

svg.text: Every transition requires cryptographic consent — no admin backdoors, no override keys
Built on Canton Network · Daml smart contracts · Pluggable custody (BitGo / Circle)
